rows.name: Vianova External Pentest
rows.description: External penetration test engagement for Vianova infrastructure. RoE approved. Scope: web applications, public-facing services, and network assets.
rows.notes: RoE signed and approved. Ready for active operations.

messages: 1350012	Vianova - dashboard-dev.vianovahealth.com	Vianova	External web application penetration test targeting customer-facing web applications. Testing will cover OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, authentication/authorization flaws, business logic errors, and sensitive data exposure.
